positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a cosmic owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl has large, intricately detailed feathers forming elegant, sharp silhouettes, rendered in deep indigo and sapphire blue, contrasting sharply against a warm, nebula-filled starlight background of pale gold, lavender, and turquoise. The composition is central and balanced, suitable for a high-contrast apparel print. The style should be a blend of retro-futurism and linework art, with clean, sharp lines and limited gradients. The overall mood is mystical, serene, and geometric.
negative: blurry, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, artifacts, noisy, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, logos, trademarks, copyright, graffiti
